entry.title: The Real GenAI Issue
entry.quote: The business leaders pumping all this money of course don’t understand the technology. They’re doing this for exactly one reason: They think they can discard armies of employees and replace them with LLM services, at the cost of shipping shittier products.

entry.title: macOS Icon History
entry.quote: Documenting the evolution of macOS system icons over the past several decades.

entry.title: How Uber Eats Scaled Search to Handle Billions of Daily Queries
entry.quote: Uber Eats scaled search by revamping indexing, geo-sharding & ranking, supporting billions of queries daily without compromising latency.

entry.title: When Figma Starts Designing Us
entry.quote: The subtle ways in which design tools shape how we think and what we make

entry.title: What Every Programmer Should Know about How CPUs Work • Matt Godbolt
entry.quote: In this talk, Matt will describe some of the performance features of modern CPUs and explain how your code is already benefiting from them. We’ll look at real-world server performance, the tooling available to measure their impact, and how compilers are often already doing the right thing for us.
